kept.text:
New Tesla Semi spotted at the Las Vegas Convention Center ahead of the ACT Expo this week, which is the largest North American trade show showcasing advanced commercial vehicles. Each side mirror has three cameras. Also has a front bumper camera (pictured below).

Tesla just started mass production of their Semi this past week in Nevada.

The ACT Expo runs from May 4-7. I think Tesla will also be letting those with a CDL to test drive it (ride alongs if no CDL).

kept.text:
Walking through the Tesla office is like walking through a computer museum.

Roadster. Model S. Model 3. Model Y. Cybertruck. Semi. Robotaxi. Optimus.

Each one a generation of compute on wheels, every iteration smarter than the last.

The cars were never the product. The intelligence inside them was.

profile_bio.description:
The most notorious Tesla Club in the world. Creator of @thextakeover and taking the Takeover global. 
2.8M followers across all channels

kept.text:
Everyone benchmarks AI on raw intelligence.

The metric that actually matters is intelligence per dollar.

Grok 4.3 is winning on that axis right now. Compute is the bottleneck for every lab. Whoever delivers the most reasoning per unit cost wins enterprise, wins API volume, wins the developer base.

That is the quiet moat Colossus is building.

kept.text:
BEML recently unveiled their Electric Dump Truck 🚛⚡️

35 Ton payload capacity
300kWh LFP pack

Expected to provide 40-60% reduction in operating costs.

Multiple countries are using such vehicles in mining operations. They recover most of their energy using regen when coming down with load, not needing to be charged as much.
